steps.venv_desc: Create isolated Python environment in venv\.
steps.pip_upgrade_desc: Update pip to the latest version.
steps.requirements_desc: Install FastAPI, uvicorn and all server dependencies from requirements.txt.
steps.rag_desc: Install sentence-transformers and faiss-cpu (~2 GB). Required for RAG search.
steps.env_desc: Create .env from .env.example. Edit it to add API keys and tokens.
steps.foundry_desc: Install Microsoft Foundry Local AI backend via winget.
steps.models_desc: Download default AI models for Foundry and RAG embeddings.
steps.shortcuts_desc: Create Start and Stop shortcuts on the desktop.
steps.extras_desc: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, OCR images, archives (40+ formats).
steps.extras_opt_skip: Skip text extraction (index only plain text and code)
steps.dev_desc: MkDocs documentation server, Microsoft Agent SDK, pytest.
steps.dev_opt_skip: Skip docs and SDK (recommended for production)
steps.rag_opt_skip: Skip RAG (saves ~2 GB, RAG search will be unavailable)
steps.foundry_opt_skip: Skip Foundry (use llama.cpp or Ollama instead)
steps.models_opt_skip: Skip model download (download later via web UI)
steps.huggingface_desc: Install huggingface_hub, transformers, accelerate. Optionally authorize with your HF token.
steps.huggingface_token_hint: For gated models (Gemma, Llama). Leave empty to skip auth.
steps.llama_desc: Extract llama.cpp binaries from bin/ and set the models directory in config.json.
